highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews Skia m151 with allocation-free hot paths and .NET 11 WASM support.
highlights_body: Multiple per-call allocations in color parsing, tag parsing, HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, and SKShaper glyph reads have been eliminated. Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries extend WASM support to .NET 11.

bullets.detail: Aligns the bundled renderer with Chrome milestone 151 and merges three rounds of upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes into the 4.151 line.
SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, avoiding the string allocation on hot paths while also optimising the internal hex-digit lookup.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: The unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, so callers no longer need an unsafe block or /unsafe compilation flag to use it.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: The SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) overload previously leaked a native image handle when the subset operation returned a new object; the extra reference is now correctly released.

bullets.lead: Allocation-free parsing in SKFourByteTag and hot SKShaper paths
bullets.detail: SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a char[4] on every call, and SKShaper now reads glyph results through zero-copy spans instead of per-call arrays.

bullets.lead: WASM build cleaned up and extended to .NET 11
bullets.detail: A redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define is dropped from the Skia submodule to silence Emscripten macro-redefinition warnings. Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for .NET 11 WASM targets.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Made HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8(string) allocation-free with pooled UTF-8 encoding and added Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM static libraries for .NET 11

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine bump and a WebAssembly build cleanup that drops the redundant SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 delivered the performance sprint — allocation-free SKColor hex parsing, SKFourByteTag parsing, HarfBuzz UTF-8 encoding, and SKShaper glyph reads — plus the GRContextOptions unsafe removal and additional upstream m151 bug fixes.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp gains an allocation-free AddUtf8(string) implementation via pooled UTF-8 encoding and removes the per-call char[4] allocation in Tag.Parse, alongside the Emscripten 5.0.6 library update for .NET 11 WASM.
